candidate.completion: lower your standards and come sit with me.
candidate.sentence: i’m lonely, please lower your standards and come sit with me.

evaluation.rationale: The turn is clear: a plea for company flips into self-discounting negotiation. 'Lower your standards' is exact and does most of the work, but the joke is somewhat familiar and the trailing clause softens the snap and elegance.

incumbent_before.sentence: i’m lonely, please put me in a group chat so I can be ignored at scale
